document.source_title: KKR playoff qualification scenario IPL 2026: Kolkata Knight Riders’ best & worst case for top 4 race

claims.claim_text: Kolkata Knight Riders need to win their last three games to have a chance at playoff qualification.
claims.evidence_text: KKR find themselves in concerning territory again. The side now needs to win its last three games.

claims.claim_text: KKR can reach a maximum of 15 points if they win all remaining matches.
claims.evidence_text: If Kolkata beat Gujarat, Mumbai, and Delhi to win all their remaining games, this will take them to a maximum of 15 points.

claims.claim_text: KKR could qualify with just 13 points under certain conditions.
claims.evidence_text: KKR could qualify with just 13 points. For this to happen, one of KKR’s two wins in their last three games should come against DC.
